# Borehole Geophysics

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-ajmi|Al-Ajmi, 2017]] contributed to the theme of Borehole Geophysics

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] focused on borehole geophysics to improve lookahead capabilities.

- [[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2003-chowdhury|CHOWDHURY, 2003]] utilized borehole geophysics (specifically electrical methods) for monitoring fluid front movement.
